fields.name: Currency Range
fields.description: For this type of question, the entrepreneur will submit an individual answer e.g. $100,000 in revenue this year and the investor will provide an acceptable range e.g. $50,000 to $150,000.

fields.name: Single Select
fields.description: These are questions where you have multiple options and must select one.

fields.name: Multi Select
fields.description: This allows the entrepreneur to select multiple options

fields.name: Integer
fields.description: These are a range of integers that are not currency.

fields.name: Free Response
fields.description: This allows the entrepreneur to add a free-response answer. It does not affect matching.

fields.name: Currency
fields.description: In this field the entrepreneur enters one currency value and it is compared against a currency range supplied by the supporter.
